hero_heading: Every Frame.Every Angle.Every Time.
hero_tagline: Australia's specialist provider of telehandler attachments, rigging and access equipment for film and television. Dry hire or fully manned — we make your production possible.
attach_intro: Carefully selected and re-engineered to cater specifically for the challenges of the film industry — versatile rigging across our full fleet of Manitou and Magni telehandlers, certified for set.
fleet_intro: An ever-growing fleet offering versatility and accessibility, with safety and limited-access solutions at the forefront.
about_statement: Every second on set counts in dollars and cents. We get that.
about_body: Led by Dan Oliver, All Angles Access brings over 30 years of personal film industry experience and a combined team depth of more than a century. We understand deadlines, departments, and the pressure of a shooting day.
about_founder_role: Founder · All Angles Access PTY Ltd
svc_intro: Let our team of in-house designers, engineers and rigging specialists make your vision a reality — using the highest quality materials and holding to the highest safety specifications.
svc1_body: Dry hire and manned access equipment rentals, telehandler attachments, silenced generators, hi-flow diesel air compressors, vehicles and track matts.
svc2_body: Full bed and tube laser cutting, plasma cutting facilities, a complete machine and engineering shop, plus steel and aluminium welding specialists.
svc3_body: Gimbals, winches and automated control systems for almost any in-camera film requirement, delivered by dedicated motion control specialists.
svc4_body: Structural engineers with 100+ years combined film experience. No request is too unreasonable — we create the solution that's right for your production.
cta_heading:
Ready to roll camera?
Let's talk.
cta_body: From the most outrageous to the simplest of film requests — our workshop and crew handle everything from manufacture to manning machines.
